problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: The key to Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? is Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine — specifically Cortical spreading depression — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
